calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Countrywide Bank, FSB k/n/a Bank of America is present. Bank representative IS NOT present.
Attorney David Marcolini speciallay appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Norris Hampton is present.
Attorney Melvin Ceasar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel confer in chambers with Judge Quidachay.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The matter is continued to February 27, 2012 for Settled Protected Date.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Continued To Dec-08-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Countrywide Bank, FSB k/n/a Bank of America is present. No representative present.
Attorney Dave Marcolini appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Noris Hampton is present.
Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Ronald Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately in chambers, for settlement discussions.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated. A settled protective date is set for 12-12-11.

An Order to Show Cause is issued for 12-8-11 for non-appearance of representatives with settlement authority.
